productDisplayName: Puma Men Black Polo Neck T-shirt
description: Style NoteThe German brand puma is known world over for their infusion of colour and minimalist styling into classic wardrobe staples. With its fine finishing and detailing this Polo neck T-shirt easily makes it to our wishlist for the Summer. Pair it with distressed denims and flip-flops for a rugged look or with track pants and sneakers for a workout.Product DetailsBlack polo neck T-shirt, rib knit spread collar, short buttoned placket, panels at front, white slot seam at front shoulder, short sleeves with branding on left sleeve, branding embroidered on right front chestMaterials and Care65% Polyester35% cottonWash and iron inside outMachine wash warm Warm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model(height 6'and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
